name: SURO CAPITAL CORP.
business: SuRo Capital Corp. is an internally managed, non-diversified closed-end management investment company that has elected to be regulated as a business development company (BDC) and invests principally in equity securities of rapidly growing venture capital-backed emerging companies.
sellsTo: accredited and non-accredited individual investors seeking exposure to private company equity
portfolio companies requiring equity capital and managerial assistance

exposures.sentence: Our investment philosophy is based on a disciplined approach of identifying promising investments in high-growth, venture-backed companies across several key industry themes, which may include, among others, Artificial Intelligence Infrastructure & Applications, Consumer Goods & Services, Software-as-a-Service, Financial Technology & Services, and Logistics & Supply Chain.

Our investment philosophy is based on a disciplined approach of identifying promising investments in high-growth, venture-backed companies across several key industry themes, which may include, among others, Artificial Intelligence Infrastructure & Applications, Consumer Goods & Services, Software-as-a-Service, Financial Technology & Services, and Logistics & Supply Chain.

Our investment philosophy is based on a disciplined approach of identifying promising investments in high-growth, venture-backed companies across several key industry themes, which may include, among others, Artificial Intelligence Infrastructure & Applications, Consumer Goods & Services, Software-as-a-Service, Financial Technology & Services, and Logistics & Supply Chain.

Our investment philosophy is based on a disciplined approach of identifying promising investments in high-growth, venture-backed companies across several key industry themes, which may include, among others, Artificial Intelligence Infrastructure & Applications, Consumer Goods & Services, Software-as-a-Service, Financial Technology & Services, and Logistics & Supply Chain.

Our investment philosophy is based on a disciplined approach of identifying promising investments in high-growth, venture-backed companies across several key industry themes, which may include, among others, Artificial Intelligence Infrastructure & Applications, Consumer Goods & Services, Software-as-a-Service, Financial Technology & Services, and Logistics & Supply Chain.

Our executive officers and investment professionals have identified six key investment themes from which we have seen significant numbers of high-growth companies emerge: Artificial Intelligence Infrastructure & Applications, Consumer Goods & Services, Software-as-a-Service, Education Technology, Financial Technology & Services, and Logistics & Supply Chain.
